feed.title: Journal of Historical Sociolinguistics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Journal of Historical Sociolinguistics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Variation and change in pronominal address in 19th and early 20th-century German private letters
entry.summary: Authors: Markus Schiegg, Stephan Elspaß DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jhsl-2023-0036 Pages: Page range: 331-362

entry.title: Orality and overtness: effects on Spanish subject use
entry.summary: Authors: Gemma McCarley DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jhsl-2024-0017 Pages: Page range: 363-395

entry.title: Mixed: Turkish–Armenian language contact and its invisibilization
entry.summary: Authors: Jennifer Manoukian DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jhsl-2024-0043 Pages: Page range: 397-427

entry.title: “Ik heef niets gezeg”: the past tense in an Anglo-Boer War concentration camp diary
entry.summary: Authors: Johanita Kirsten DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jhsl-2023-0062 Pages: Page range: 429-449

entry.title: (De)constructing “verbatimness”: a study of speech reporting strategies in the late modern Flemish courtroom
entry.summary: Authors: Magda Serwadczak DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jhsl-2024-0025 Pages: Page range: 451-480

entry.title: Spanish socio-historical linguistics: isolation and contact
entry.summary: Authors: Jason Doroga DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jhsl-2022-0002 Pages: Page range: 481-486

entry.title: Hillary Taylor: Language and Social Relations in Early Modern England
entry.summary: Authors: Tino Oudesluijs DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jhsl-2024-0061 Pages: Page range: 487-490

entry.title: Investigating West Germanic Languages

entry.title: The Victorians and English dialect
entry.summary: Authors: Paul Cooper DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jhsl-2024-0057 Pages: Page range: 495-499
